statement: The forced quantum circuits kernel retains generated wires; information units; reversible gates; causal circuit order; complete branchwise evaluation; inverse circuit; observation boundary; resource ledger; branch support, phase, transformation, observation, composition and resources remain exact, finite, source-bound and free of imported amplitudes or postulates.
title: Fold quantum circuit syntax and semantics law
